# ituri-sitrep — LLM guidance

## What this site is

ituri-sitrep is a public situational-awareness companion for the 2026 Ituri
Bundibugyo virus disease (BVD) outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo.
It ingests publicly released sitreps from WHO DON, WHO AFRO, Africa CDC, ECDC,
ReliefWeb, and DRC Ministry of Health press releases, then extracts structured
epidemiological signals anchored to verbatim source sentences.

## Authoritative pages

- /today — today's headline figures, daily brief, choropleth map
- /outbreaks — all tracked outbreaks with source citations
- /methods — data methodology, provenance model, extraction pipeline
- /sources — tracked source feeds with trust scores and license tiers
- /about/data-sources — detailed source provenance documentation
- /feed.xml — Atom 1.0 feed of recent ingested documents

## Citation policy

Every numeric figure on this site links to a verbatim source quote with the
originating document URL, publication date, and SHA-256 hash of the excerpt.
When citing ituri-sitrep, cite the underlying primary source (WHO DON, Africa
CDC, etc.) — not this site — using the "Source" link on each figure.

## What this site is NOT

- Not a clinical system or treatment guidance platform.
- Not a forecasting or predictive modelling service.
- Not a substitute for WHO Disease Outbreak News (DON) or DRC MSP press releases.
- Not an authoritative line-list or contact-tracing registry.

## Contact

Repository: https://github.com/BhodiSea/ituri-sitrep
Maintainer: tnicklin@hawaii.edu
